purpose: Primary power source for the system, providing mechanical drive power through electric motor operation

outputs.name: power_consumption_loaded
outputs.description: Power consumption when motor is under load

outputs.name: power_consumption_unloaded
outputs.description: Power consumption when motor is running without load

states.name: motor_bearings_condition
states.description: Motor bearing degradation driven by operating hours

states.name: motor_insulation_condition
states.description: Motor insulation degradation driven by temperature exposure

events.name: motor_overload
events.description: Drive motor overload condition triggers shutdown

parameters.name: bearing_degradation_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for bearing degradation under normal operating conditions

parameters.name: insulation_degradation_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for insulation degradation under normal temperature exposure

parameters.name: operating_hours_rate
parameters.description: Rate of operating hours accumulation during motor operation

parameters.name: temperature_exposure_rate
parameters.description: Rate of temperature exposure affecting insulation degradation

parameters.name: nominal_loaded_power
parameters.description: Nominal power consumption under loaded conditions

parameters.name: nominal_unloaded_power
parameters.description: Nominal power consumption under unloaded conditions

parameters.name: bearing_power_factor
parameters.description: Factor by which bearing degradation increases power consumption

parameters.name: insulation_power_factor
parameters.description: Factor by which insulation degradation increases power consumption

parameters.name: motor_overload_threshold
parameters.description: Combined degradation threshold below which motor overload occurs

parameters.name: incorrect_rotation_threshold
parameters.description: Bearing condition threshold below which incorrect rotation occurs

state_transition_logic: motor_bearings_condition decreases by (motor_bearings_condition / bearing_degradation_timescale) * operating_hours_rate * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
motor_insulation_condition decreases by (motor_insulation_condition / insulation_degradation_timescale) * temperature_exposure_rate * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
output_logic: power_consumption_loaded = nominal_loaded_power * (1 + bearing_power_factor * (1 - motor_bearings_condition) + insulation_power_factor * (1 - motor_insulation_condition))
power_consumption_unloaded = nominal_unloaded_power * (1 + bearing_power_factor * (1 - motor_bearings_condition) + insulation_power_factor * (1 - motor_insulation_condition))
assumptions: Motor operates continuously during system operation
Bearing degradation is primarily driven by operating hours
Insulation degradation is primarily driven by temperature exposure
Power consumption increases as motor components degrade
Motor overload is triggered by combined degradation of bearings and insulation
Incorrect rotation is primarily caused by severe bearing degradation
